jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Workers Runtime
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Cloudflare Workers V8 isolate runtime that powers tens of millions of requests per second across the global edge network's distributed serverless platform.

  • Rust, V8, and high-throughput edge-runtime experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer Trust & Safety
jobs.content: Own Cloudflare's customer trust-and-safety strategy roadmap across enterprise-account adoption, abuse-mitigation policy, and Zero Trust platform engagement motion.
